title: Babes on Swing Street
writer: Howard Dimsdale, Eugene Conrad, Brenda Weisberg
actors: Ann Blyth, Peggy Ryan, Andy Devine
plot: Barber Joe Costello prefers to let his teenage daughter Trudy shave his customers while he plays the accordion. One day, Trudy's wealthy heiress friend, Carol Curtis, arrives at the Costello barber show and announces that Mr. Anse...
